skills.name: Excel Data Handler
skills.description: Analyze tabular files (CSV/XLSX/XLS/Parquet) with pandas operations.
skills.when_to_use: Use when user asks to inspect, filter, summarize, group, or search structured data files.
skills.action_contract: Set action.operation to one of preview, columns, describe, filter_eq, filter_contains, search_text_any_column, groupby_sum, value_counts, python_code. For complex tasks prefer python_code with action.args.code containing executable pandas code. Available helpers in python_code: discover_files(), read_table(rel_path), write_table(df, rel_path), optional preloaded df if action.file is set, and assign final output to variable result.
examples: hvilke kolonner er der i filen
find alle rækker der nævner Lars
gruppér efter category og summer total_sales
lav et finansielt overblik med summer pr. konto
self_test_questions: Giv et hurtigt overblik over Transformed_Financial_Data.csv med antal rækker, datointerval og total Beløb.
Vis alle unikke datoer i datasættet.
Find de datoer med højest samlet Beløb.

skills.name: Memory Writer
skills.description: Save notes and knowledge to persistent memory folders (memory/notes and memory/knowledge).
skills.when_to_use: Use when the agent should persist information for future sessions: save analysis findings to knowledge, save working notes or session summaries to notes, or when the user explicitly asks to remember or save something.
skills.action_contract: Set action.operation to one of write, append, list. Set action.folder to 'notes' or 'knowledge'. For write/append set action.filename (kebab-case, .md extension) and action.content (the text to save). Use 'knowledge' for confirmed insights and stable reference material. Use 'notes' for session summaries, observations, and working documents.
examples: husk at den vigtigste metrik er ROAS
gem et resumé af denne analyse
skriv en note om dagens findings
hvad har du gemt i notes?
self_test_questions: Gem en note om at datasættet indeholder finansielle transaktioner.
Tilføj en observation til mine noter.
